name: Barfi
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt half a stick of butter in a heavy skillet.
2. Add the evaporated milk and stir constantly.
3. Bring to a boil over low heat.
4. Reduce heat and cook until the milk thickens.
5. Gradually add the ground cashews and sugar, stirring continuously.
6. Cook for 10 minutes on low heat.
7. Turn off the heat.
8. Pour the mixture onto a flat dish and spread evenly with the back of a spoon.
9. Allow to cool completely.
10. Cut into small squares.
